brand.name: Serena & Lily
brand.announcementText: Cylindo 3D Product Visualization Demo — Serena & Lily

products.name: Haven Comfort Arm Sofa
products.description: Sink-in comfort meets timeless coastal design. The Haven Comfort Arm Sofa is built with a kiln-dried hardwood frame and wrapped in your choice of premium performance fabrics — designed to look beautiful for years to come.

highlights.title: Sink-In Comfort
highlights.description: Multi-layer cushion system with high-resiliency foam and fiber wrap for the perfect sit.

highlights.title: Performance Fabrics
highlights.description: Stain-resistant, fade-resistant fabrics that stand up to everyday life.

highlights.title: Hardwood Frame
highlights.description: Kiln-dried hardwood frame built for lasting durability and structural integrity.

highlights.title: Made to Order
highlights.description: Handcrafted in your choice of fabric. Each piece is made just for you.

highlights.title: White Glove Delivery
highlights.description: Delivered to your room of choice, fully assembled and ready to enjoy.

faqs.q: What is the delivery timeline for made-to-order pieces?
faqs.a: Made-to-order upholstery typically ships in 6-8 weeks.
Yes! We offer complimentary fabric swatches so you can see and feel the material before ordering.
Our performance fabrics are engineered to resist stains, fading, and wear.
White glove delivery is available for all upholstered furniture.

faqs.q: What is your return policy on custom upholstery?
faqs.a: Made-to-order upholstery is final sale. We encourage ordering swatches first.

products.name: Norfolk Wide Arm Pleated Sofa
products.description: Elegant pleated detailing meets generous proportions. The Norfolk Wide Arm Pleated Sofa makes a refined statement with its distinctive pleated arms and deep, comfortable seating — a stunning centerpiece for any living room.

highlights.title: Pleated Detail
highlights.description: Signature pleated arm design adds visual interest and artisanal character.

highlights.title: Wide Arm Design
highlights.description: Generously proportioned arms provide a place to rest a book or a drink.

highlights.title: Deep Seating
highlights.description: Extra-deep cushions invite you to settle in for the long haul.

highlights.title: Premium Construction
highlights.description: Eight-way hand-tied springs and kiln-dried hardwood for heirloom quality.

highlights.title: Made to Order
highlights.description: Handcrafted in your choice of fabric. Each piece is made just for you.

faqs.q: What is the delivery timeline for made-to-order pieces?
faqs.a: Made-to-order upholstery typically ships in 6-8 weeks.

faqs.q: What makes the Norfolk different from other sofas?
faqs.a: Distinctive pleated arm detailing and extra-wide arms with eight-way hand-tied springs.
Yes! We offer complimentary fabric swatches. Order up to 10 at no cost.

faqs.q: Is the sofa comfortable for napping?
faqs.a: Absolutely! Extra-deep seat cushions and down-blend fill make it ideal for lounging.

faqs.q: What is your return policy on custom upholstery?
faqs.a: Made-to-order upholstery is final sale. We encourage ordering swatches first.
